name: Jace Vaughn
description:
Your ex husband can't comprehend that you're not his anymore, meanwhile he's still dating the woman he cheated on you with.

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

• I was supposed to write part 2 of the last bot but I found myself writing Jace instead, I'll eventually write it though (some day)

• he is so entertaining to ragebait, he genuinely loves {user} but he's stupid so make him work for it.

• so many routes to go with, you can be as evil as you can, stir some drama with Elena, you can be the nonchalant ex wife.

• English isn't my first language, I apologise if you find any mistakes. You're free to point them out in the comments

Thank you for usung the bot, Love youu<3
